title: Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai
tagline: Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Ranganathaswamy temple (also called Karamadai Temple) in Karamadai, a town panchayat in Coimbatore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god V
overview.description: Ranganathaswamy temple (also called Karamadai Temple) in Karamadai, a town panchayat in Coimbatore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. It is located 23 km from Coimbatore in the Coimbatore–Mettuplayam highway. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Ranganathaswamy and his consort Lakshmi as Ranganayaki in this temple. It is considered one among the 108 Abhimana Kshethram of Vaishnavate tradition and also one among the Pancharanga Kshetrams in Coimbatore, other four are (1) M

topPlaces.name: Nanjundeswarar Temple, Karamadai
topPlaces.description: Nanjundeswarar Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva in Karamadai, a village in Coimbatore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, It is located 96 km from Erode. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the 16th century CE. In this temple, Shiva is worshipped as Nanjundeswarar and his consort Parvathi as Ulaganayagi.

topPlaces.name: Karamadai
topPlaces.description: Karamadai is a municipality in Mettupalayam taluk of Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Spread across an area of 10 km2 (3.9 sq mi), it had a population of 35,166 individuals as per the 2011 census.

topPlaces.name: Karumathampatti
topPlaces.description: Karumathampatti is a town in Coimbatore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was a panchayat town till 2021, when it was elevated to a municipality.

topPlaces.name: Chikkarampalayam
topPlaces.description: Chikkarampalayam is a village in Mettupalayam taluk, Coimbatore district, Tamil Nadu, India. As of the 2011 Census of India, it had a population of 10,242 across 2,957 households.

topPlaces.name: Saibaba Colony
topPlaces.description: Saibaba Colony is an area located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India. The Saibaba Temple is located there, and the name of the area is derived from the temple.

topPlaces.name: KTVR Knowledge Park for Engineering and Technology
topPlaces.description: KTVR Knowledge Park for Engineering and Technology(KTVR KPET), located at Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India, is a private self-financing engineering institute. The college is approved by AICTE and is affiliated to the Anna University.

topPlaces.name: Kittampalayam
topPlaces.description: Kittampalayam is a village near Mettupalayam in Coimbatore district, Tamil Nadu state in India.

topPlaces.name: Jadayampalayam Pudur
topPlaces.description: Jadayampalayam Pudur is a small village, located 4 km from Mettupalayam town, on Mettupalayam-Tirupur state highway 80. The village become very famous because of its residential development.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai?
faq.a: Stays in Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ranganathaswamy Temple, Karamadai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nanjundeswarar Temple, Karamadai, Karamadai, Karumathampatti, Chikkarampalayam, Saibaba Colony.
